component.name: Spinner
component.description: Animated loading indicator for indeterminate operations.

useCases: Button loading state during async actions
Inline loading indicator next to content

commonPatterns.name: inline-spinner
commonPatterns.description: Small spinner next to loading text

commonPatterns.name: button-loading
commonPatterns.description: Spinner inside a disabled button during submission

antiPatterns.reason: Spinner indicates unknown duration; users lose context about how much remains
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Progress when the completion percentage is known

antiPatterns.reason: Screen readers need to announce the loading state
antiPatterns.alternative: Spinner has a built-in aria-label="Loading"; override with a custom aria-label if needed

responsive.mobile: Same behavior; size may be adjusted via className
responsive.desktop: Same behavior; size may be adjusted via className

rules: Use for indeterminate loading only — use Progress for known percentages
Default aria-label is "Loading"; override when context differs
Resize via className (e.g. size-6, size-8) — default is size-4
Uses Loader2Icon from lucide-react with animate-spin

aiHints.context: Use for indeterminate loading (unknown duration). Renders a spinning Loader2Icon SVG with role="status" and aria-label="Loading". Default size is 16px (size-4); resize via className. For known completion percentage use Progress; for content placeholders use Skeleton.
